name: Carpentry Apprenticeship Year 3
description: Third-year related technical instruction for the residential carpentry apprenticeship. Covers advanced framing stair layout roof systems and finish carpentry with hands-on lab work at the Wake Tech shop.

name: OSHA 30 Safety
description: OSHA 30-hour construction safety certification. Fall protection hazard communication scaffolding electrical safety and jobsite health standards. Required for the apprenticeship.

name: Blueprint Reading
description: Reading and interpreting residential construction drawings. Plan views elevations sections details dimensioning and scale. Practice takeoffs from real floor plans and framing sheets.
